name: Appetizer Ham Ball
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, combine the deviled ham, chopped olives, mustard, and Tabasco sauce.
2. Form the mixture into a ball on a serving dish and chill.
3. In another bowl, mix the cream cheese and milk until smooth.
4. Frost the ham ball with the cream cheese mixture.
5. Chill again before serving.
6. Trim the ham ball with parsley just before serving.
7. Pass assorted crackers alongside the appetizer.
